name: Quick Chat
afterHooks: cd $RELEASE_PATH && docker compose -p crypto-app --env-file /home/yurii/crypto-curr-port-val/.env -f compose.yaml -f compose.prod.yaml down --remove-orphans && docker rm -f crypto-app-pwa crypto-app-php crypto-app-db crypto-app-scheduler crypto-app-scheduler-prod 2>/dev/null || true && docker compose -p crypto-app --env-file /home/yurii/crypto-curr-port-val/.env -f compose.yaml -f compose.prod.yaml build --no-cache --pull php php-scheduler pwa && docker compose -p crypto-app --env-file /home/yurii/crypto-curr-port-val/.env -f compose.yaml -f compose.prod.yaml up -d --remove-orphans && sleep 10 && docker exec crypto-app-php php bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate --no-interaction
